julesThoughtProcess: I chose a vibrant phosphor green (#00FF00) to stand out sharply against the 1-bit high-contrast aesthetic, echoing the glow of old terminal screens that still blink away in the dusty tech-dens of the lower city.
storyPanel: It was just another routine maintenance run for Elara in the under-spire relay hubs. The old automated drones whirred past, their sensors cracked but functional, nodding slightly as they worked in tandem with human hands. Even down here, among the tangled fiber optics and steam vents, people found ways to thrive. A small holographic garden flickered in the corner—someone's little piece of life amidst the metal. It wasn't perfect, and the work was hard, but the grid hummed with a resilient, quiet heartbeat.
